evidence.snippet: Sub-miniature ADS-B, FLARM, UAT, REMOTE-ID modules for direct integration.

##### ADS-B, GNSS
*   High quality and low price **OEM ADS-­B/GNSS** receiver series operating at **a frequency 1090MHz.** It is based on the proven **FPGA-In-The\_LoopTM** technology, a unique combination of a single-core processor and **FPGA.

**idME (Remote Identification module)** is designed to meet the requirements of remote drone identification and localization in **ASTM/ASD-STAN** standards.
Using the **BLE broadcast** technology, our device provides surveillance and drone operator identification capability based on any modern mobile device such as a smartphone or tablet.

items.notes: Core product line is sub-miniature ADS-B, FLARM, UAT, and Remote ID (BLE/Wi-Fi) modules and transponders for UAS airspace integration.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells OEM ADS-B/FLARM/Remote ID modules and Plug&Play add-on units that integrate into existing UAS platforms. Products are electronic modules/boards, not complete drones. Also supplies ground receiver infrastructure.

tagline: Polish communications and ground-segment supplier producing ADS-B/FLARM transceivers (TR-1F, TT-SF2), Remote ID modules (TT-RR1, idME family), multi-system UAS trackers (trkME), and airspace surveillance receivers for integration into small platforms and ground stations. FCC certification confirmed for idME Remote ID line; NDAA and Blue UAS status unknown. Limited public evidence of US defense contracts or program integration.
